description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Publish Python distribution to PyPI that triggers on published releases. The workflow should have two jobs: one to build a Python distribution and another to publish it to PyPI. The build job should run on ubuntu-latest, check out the code, set up Python 3.x, install build, and create a source tarball. The publish job should depend on the build job, download the distribution, and publish it to PyPI using a GitHub Action.
